label: Established
headline: The public-market proof for Indian fintech
businessPattern: Turn trusted payment rails into a wider merchant operating system.
whyThisWeek: PhonePe filing for a $15B NSE listing makes Indian payments feel less like a subsidy war and more like infrastructure.
copyablePrompt: Build a trust-first merchant tool for one offline category that already depends on payments but still runs the rest of the workflow manually.

label: Startup
headline: Quick commerce becomes a real operating model
businessPattern: Compress a recurring purchase into a high-frequency habit with local execution depth.
whyThisWeek: Zepto reaching profitable per-order economics across 30 Indian cities turns speed from a stunt into a repeatable business pattern.
copyablePrompt: Build a neighborhood-first service that wins by removing waiting time from one routine purchase.

label: Frontier
headline: Local-language AI creates the next app layer
businessPattern: Use a domain-specific model gap to unlock products global platforms do not prioritize.
whyThisWeek: Sarvam's open-weight Indian language model gives builders a self-hostable base for vernacular workflows.
copyablePrompt: Build an AI workflow for one Indian-language user group whose current tools assume English.
